title: Dependency
description: One external dependency of the service (HTTP API, datastore, broker), with where it was declared, its engine where known, and its criticality to the service's flows.

engine.description: Datastore/broker engine (e.g. postgres, kafka) — folded in from the former DataStore kind (S1: app binds X, not the infra).

plan.description: Service plan from the cf-env snapshot (.sre/cf-env.json), when one is checked in.

managed.description: Broker-managed service vs user-provided, from the cf-env snapshot.

snapshot.description: Freshness marker for snapshot-derived fields (capturedAt) — snapshot facts drift from live platform state; sre-kb diff catches that.
